headline: Nextpower, Helios, Keysight, Hyster-Yale Materials Handling, and Generac Shares Are Falling, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after geopolitical tensions in the Middle East sent crude oil prices soaring, stoking fears of resurgent inflation.

headline: Keysight and Qualcomm Advance RF Digital Twins to Scale Massive MIMO and AI-Native 6G Research
summary: SANTA ROSA, Calif., March 03, 2026--Collaboration links digital twins with real-world measurements to reduce risk and speed development for 5G-advanced and emerging 6G networks.

headline: Samsung Electronics AI Phones And Satellite Push Test Rich Valuation
summary: Samsung Electronics (KOSE:A005930) has launched its Galaxy S26 smartphones and Galaxy Buds4 audio lineup, introducing new mobile AI features, privacy display technology and premium sound hardware. The company also highlighted joint work with Keysight Technologies on non terrestrial 5G and LEO satellite connectivity as part of its preparation for 5G and 6G readiness. The announcements arrive with Samsung Electronics shares at ₩216,500.0, alongside very strong multi year share price...
